00020 
00027 #ifndef JELATINE_KNI_H
00028 #   define JELATINE_KNI_H (1)
00029 
00030 #include "wrappers.h"
00031 
00032 #include "array.h"
00033 #include "class.h"
00034 #include "loader.h"
00035 #include "thread.h"
00036 
00037 #include "java_lang_String.h"
00038 
00039 /******************************************************************************
00040  * KNI basic types                                                            *
00041  ******************************************************************************/
00042 
00044 typedef uint8_t jboolean;
00045 
00047 typedef uint8_t jbyte;
00048 
00050 typedef uint16_t jchar;
00051 
00053 typedef int16_t jshort;
00054 
00056 typedef int32_t jint;
00057 
00059 typedef int64_t jlong;
00060 
00062 typedef float jfloat;
00063 
00065 typedef double jdouble;
00066 
00068 typedef jint jsize;
00069 
00070 /******************************************************************************
00071  * KNI reference types                                                        *
00072  ******************************************************************************/
00073 
00075 typedef uintptr_t *jobject;
00076 
00078 typedef uintptr_t *jclass;
00079 
00081 typedef jobject jthrowable;
00082 
00084 typedef jobject jstring;
00085 
00087 typedef jobject jarray;
00088 
00090 typedef jarray  jbooleanArray;
00091 
00093 typedef jarray  jbyteArray;
00094 
00096 typedef jarray  jcharArray;
00097 
00099 typedef jarray  jshortArray;
00100 
00102 typedef jarray  jintArray;
00103 
00105 typedef jarray  jlongArray;
00106 
00108 typedef jarray  jfloatArray;
00109 
00111 typedef jarray  jdoubleArray;
00112 
00114 typedef jarray  jobjectArray;
00115 
00117 typedef uintptr_t jfieldID;
00118 
00119 /******************************************************************************
00120  * KNI return types                                                           *
00121  ******************************************************************************/
00122 
00124 #define KNI_RETURNTYPE_VOID void
00125 
00127 #define KNI_RETURNTYPE_BOOLEAN int32_t
00128 
00130 #define KNI_RETURNTYPE_BYTE int32_t
00131 
00133 #define KNI_RETURNTYPE_CHAR int32_t
00134 
00136 #define KNI_RETURNTYPE_SHORT int32_t
00137 
00139 #define KNI_RETURNTYPE_INT int32_t
00140 
00142 #define KNI_RETURNTYPE_LONG int64_t
00143 
00145 #define KNI_RETURNTYPE_FLOAT float
00146 
00148 #define KNI_RETURNTYPE_DOUBLE double
00149 
00151 #define KNI_RETURNTYPE_OBJECT uintptr_t
00152 
00153 /******************************************************************************
00154  * Various constants                                                          *
00155  ******************************************************************************/
00156 
00163 #define KNI_FALSE (0)
00164 #define KNI_TRUE  (1)
00165 
00178 #define KNI_OK     (0)
00179 #define KNI_ERR    (-1)
00180 #define KNI_ENOMEM (-4)
00181 #define KNI_EINVAL (-6)
00182 
00183 /******************************************************************************
00184  * Version information                                                        *
00185  ******************************************************************************/
00186 
00188 #define KNI_VERSION (0x00010000)
00189 
00193 static inline jint KNI_GetVersion( void )
00194 {
00195     return KNI_VERSION;
00196 } // KNI_GetVersion()
00197 
00198 /******************************************************************************
00199  * Class and interface operations                                             *
00200  ******************************************************************************/
00201 
00210 static inline void KNI_FindClass(const char *name, jclass classHandle)
00211 {
00212     class_t *cl = bcl_find_class(name);
00213 
00214     if (cl != NULL) {
00215         *classHandle = class_get_object(cl);
00216     } else {
00217         *classHandle = JNULL;
00218     }
00219 } // KNI_FindClass()
00220 
00229 static inline void KNI_GetSuperClass(jclass classHandle,
00230                                      jclass superClassHandle)
00231 {
00232     class_t *cl, *parent;
00233 
00234     cl = bcl_get_class_by_id(JAVA_LANG_CLASS_REF2PTR(*classHandle)->id);
00235     parent = class_get_parent(cl);
00236     *superClassHandle = class_get_object(parent);
00237 } // KNI_GetSuperClass()
00238 
00252 static inline jboolean KNI_IsAssignableFrom(jclass cl1, jclass cl2)
00253 {
00254     class_t *src = bcl_get_class_by_id(JAVA_LANG_CLASS_REF2PTR(*cl1)->id);
00255     class_t *dest = bcl_get_class_by_id(JAVA_LANG_CLASS_REF2PTR(*cl2)->id);
00256 
00257     return bcl_is_assignable(src, dest) ? KNI_TRUE : KNI_FALSE;
00258 } // KNI_IsAssignableFrom()
00259 
00260 /******************************************************************************
00261  * Exceptions and errors                                                      *
00262  ******************************************************************************/
00263 
00264 extern jint KNI_ThrowNew(const char *, const char *);
00265 extern void KNI_FatalError(const char *);
00266 
00267 /******************************************************************************
00268  * Object operations                                                          *
00269  ******************************************************************************/
00270 
00278 static inline void KNI_GetObjectClass(jobject objectHandle, jclass classHandle)
00279 {
00280     class_t *cl;
00281 
00282     if (*objectHandle == JNULL) {
00283         *classHandle = JNULL;
00284     } else {
00285         cl = header_get_class((header_t *) *(objectHandle));
00286         *classHandle = class_get_object(cl);
00287     }
00288 } // KNI_GetObjectClass()
00289 
00297 static inline jboolean KNI_IsInstanceOf(jobject objectHandle,
00298                                         jclass classHandle)
00299 {
00300     class_t *cl;
00301     class_t *obj = header_get_class((header_t *) *objectHandle);
00302 
00303     cl = bcl_get_class_by_id(JAVA_LANG_CLASS_REF2PTR(*classHandle)->id);
00304 
00305     return bcl_is_assignable(obj, cl) ? KNI_TRUE : KNI_FALSE;
00306 } // KNI_IsInstanceOf()
00307 
00308 /******************************************************************************
00309  * Instance field access                                                      *
00310  ******************************************************************************/
00311 
00312 extern jfieldID KNI_GetFieldID(jclass classHandle, const char *name,
00313                                const char *signature);
00314 
00322 static inline jboolean KNI_GetBooleanField(jobject objectHandle,
00323                                            jfieldID fieldID)
00324 {
00325     uint8_t nibble = *((uint8_t *) (*objectHandle + (fieldID >> 3)));
00326 
00327     return (nibble >> (fieldID & 0x7)) & 0x1;
00328 } // KNI_GetBooleanField()
00329 
00337 static inline jbyte KNI_GetByteField(jobject objectHandle, jfieldID fieldID)
00338 {
00339     return *((int8_t *) (*objectHandle + fieldID));
00340 } // KNI_GetByteField()
00341 
00349 static inline jchar KNI_GetCharField(jobject objectHandle, jfieldID fieldID)
00350 {
00351     return *((uint16_t *) (*objectHandle + fieldID));
00352 } // KNI_GetCharField()
00353 
00361 static inline jshort KNI_GetShortField(jobject objectHandle, jfieldID fieldID)
00362 {
00363     return *((int16_t *) (*objectHandle + fieldID));
00364 } // KNI_GetShortField()
00365 
00373 static inline jint KNI_GetIntField(jobject objectHandle, jfieldID fieldID)
00374 {
00375     return *((int32_t *) (*objectHandle + fieldID));
00376 } // KNI_GetIntField()
00377 
00385 static inline jlong KNI_GetLongField(jobject objectHandle, jfieldID fieldID)
00386 {
00387     return *((int64_t *) (*objectHandle + fieldID));
00388 } // KNI_GetLongField()
00389 
00390 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00391 
00399 static inline jfloat KNI_GetFloatField(jobject objectHandle, jfieldID fieldID)
00400 {
00401     return *((float *) (*objectHandle + fieldID));
00402 } // KNI_GetFloatField()
00403 
00411 static inline jdouble KNI_GetDoubleField(jobject objectHandle, jfieldID fieldID)
00412 {
00413     return *((double *) (*objectHandle + fieldID));
00414 } // KNI_GetDoubleField()
00415 
00416 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00417 
00425 static inline void KNI_GetObjectField(jobject objectHandle, jfieldID fieldID,
00426                                       jobject toHandle)
00427 {
00428     *toHandle = *((uintptr_t *) (*objectHandle + fieldID));
00429 } // KNI_GetObjectField()
00430 
00438 static inline void KNI_SetBooleanField(jobject objectHandle, jfieldID fieldID,
00439                                        jboolean value)
00440 {
00441     uint8_t nvalue = value ^ 0x1;
00442     uint8_t nibble = *((uint8_t *) (*objectHandle + (fieldID >> 3)));
00443 
00444     nibble |= value << (fieldID & 0x7);
00445     nibble &= ~(nvalue << (fieldID & 0x7));
00446     *((uint8_t *) (*objectHandle + (fieldID >> 3))) = nibble;
00447 } // KNI_SetBooleanField()
00448 
00456 static inline void KNI_SetByteField(jobject objectHandle, jfieldID fieldID,
00457                                     jbyte value)
00458 {
00459     *((int8_t *) (*objectHandle + fieldID)) = value;
00460 } // KNI_SetByteField()
00461 
00469 static inline void KNI_SetCharField(jobject objectHandle, jfieldID fieldID,
00470                                     jchar value)
00471 {
00472     *((uint16_t *) (*objectHandle + fieldID)) = value;
00473 } // KNI_SetCharField()
00474 
00482 static inline void KNI_SetShortField(jobject objectHandle, jfieldID fieldID,
00483                                      jshort value)
00484 {
00485     *((int16_t *) (*objectHandle + fieldID)) = value;
00486 } // KNI_SetShortField()
00487 
00495 static inline void KNI_SetIntField(jobject objectHandle, jfieldID fieldID,
00496                                    jint value)
00497 {
00498     *((int32_t *) (*objectHandle + fieldID)) = value;
00499 } // KNI_SetIntField()
00500 
00508 static inline void KNI_SetLongField(jobject objectHandle, jfieldID fieldID,
00509                                     jlong value)
00510 {
00511     *((int64_t *) (*objectHandle + fieldID)) = value;
00512 } // KNI_SetLongField()
00513 
00514 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00515 
00523 static inline void KNI_SetFloatField(jobject objectHandle, jfieldID fieldID,
00524                                      jfloat value)
00525 {
00526     *((float *) (*objectHandle + fieldID)) = value;
00527 } // KNI_SetFloatField()
00528 
00536 static inline void KNI_SetDoubleField(jobject objectHandle, jfieldID fieldID,
00537                                       jdouble value)
00538 {
00539     *((double *) (*objectHandle + fieldID)) = value;
00540 } // KNI_SetDoubleField()
00541 
00542 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00543 
00552 static inline void KNI_SetObjectField(jobject objectHandle, jfieldID fieldID,
00553                                       jobject fromHandle)
00554 {
00555     *((uintptr_t *) (*objectHandle + fieldID)) = *fromHandle;
00556 } // KNI_SetObjectField()
00557 
00558 /******************************************************************************
00559  * Static field access                                                        *
00560  ******************************************************************************/
00561 
00562 extern jfieldID KNI_GetStaticFieldID(jclass, const char *, const char *);
00563 
00571 static inline jboolean KNI_GetStaticBooleanField(
00572     jclass classHandle ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED, jfieldID fieldID)
00573 {
00574     return *((uint8_t *) fieldID);
00575 } // KNI_GetStaticBooleanField()
00576 
00584 static inline jbyte KNI_GetStaticByteField(jclass classHandle ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED,
00585                                            jfieldID fieldID)
00586 {
00587     return *((int8_t *) fieldID);
00588 } // KNI_GetStaticByteField()
00589 
00597 static inline jchar KNI_GetStaticCharField(jclass classHandle ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED,
00598                                            jfieldID fieldID)
00599 {
00600     return *((uint16_t *) fieldID);
00601 } // KNI_GetStaticCharField()
00602 
00610 static inline jshort KNI_GetStaticShortField(
00611     jclass classHandle ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED, jfieldID fieldID)
00612 {
00613     return *((int16_t *) fieldID);
00614 } // KNI_GetStaticShortField()
00615 
00623 static inline jint KNI_GetStaticIntField(jclass classHandle ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED,
00624                                          jfieldID fieldID)
00625 {
00626     return *((int32_t *) fieldID);
00627 } // KNI_GetStaticIntField()
00628 
00636 static inline jlong KNI_GetStaticLongField(jclass classHandle ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED,
00637                                            jfieldID fieldID)
00638 {
00639     return *((int64_t *) fieldID);
00640 } // KNI_GetStaticLongField()
00641 
00642 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00643 
00651 static inline jfloat KNI_GetStaticFloatField(
00652     jclass classHandle ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED, jfieldID fieldID)
00653 {
00654     return *((float *) fieldID);
00655 } // KNI_GetStaticFloatField()
00656 
00664 static inline jdouble KNI_GetStaticDoubleField(
00665     jclass classHandle ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED, jfieldID fieldID)
00666 {
00667     return *((double *) fieldID);
00668 } // KNI_GetStaticDoubleField()
00669 
00670 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00671 
00679 static inline void KNI_GetStaticObjectField(jclass classHandle ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED,
00680                                             jfieldID fieldID, jobject toHandle)
00681 {
00682     *toHandle = *((uintptr_t *) fieldID);
00683 } // KNI_GetStaticObjectField()
00684 
00692 static inline void KNI_SetStaticBooleanField(
00693     jclass classHandle ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED, jfieldID fieldID, jboolean value)
00694 {
00695     *((uint8_t *) fieldID) = value;
00696 } // KNI_SetStaticBooleanField()
00697 
00705 static inline void KNI_SetStaticByteField(jclass classHandle ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED,
00706                                           jfieldID fieldID, jbyte value)
00707 {
00708     *((int8_t *) fieldID) = value;
00709 } // KNI_SetStaticByteField()
00710 
00718 static inline void KNI_SetStaticCharField(jclass classHandle ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED,
00719                                           jfieldID fieldID, jchar value)
00720 {
00721     *((uint16_t *) fieldID) = value;
00722 } // KNI_SetStaticCharField()
00723 
00731 static inline void KNI_SetStaticShortField(jclass classHandle ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED,
00732                                            jfieldID fieldID, jshort value)
00733 {
00734     *((int16_t *) fieldID) = value;
00735 } // KNI_SetStaticShortField()
00736 
00744 static inline void KNI_SetStaticIntField(jclass classHandle ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED,
00745                                          jfieldID fieldID, jint value)
00746 {
00747     *((int32_t *) fieldID) = value;
00748 } // KNI_SetStaticIntField()
00749 
00757 static inline void KNI_SetStaticLongField(jclass classHandle ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED,
00758                                           jfieldID fieldID, jlong value)
00759 {
00760     *((int64_t *) fieldID) = value;
00761 } // KNI_SetStaticLongField()
00762 
00763 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00764 
00772 static inline void KNI_SetStaticFloatField(jclass classHandle ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED,
00773                                            jfieldID fieldID, jfloat value)
00774 {
00775     *((float *) fieldID) = value;
00776 } // KNI_SetStaticFloatField()
00777 
00785 static inline void KNI_SetStaticDoubleField(jclass classHandle ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED,
00786                                             jfieldID fieldID, jdouble value)
00787 {
00788     *((double *) fieldID) = value;
00789 } // KNI_SetStaticDoubleField()
00790 
00791 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00792 
00801 static inline void KNI_SetStaticObjectField(jclass classHandle ATTRIBUTE_UNUSED,
00802                                             jfieldID fieldID,
00803                                             jobject fromHandle)
00804 {
00805     *((uintptr_t *) fieldID) = *fromHandle;
00806 } // KNI_SetStaticObjectField()
00807 
00808 /******************************************************************************
00809  * String operations                                                          *
00810  ******************************************************************************/
00811 
00819 static inline jsize KNI_GetStringLength(jstring stringHandle)
00820 {
00821     java_lang_String_t *string;
00822 
00823     if (*stringHandle) {
00824         string = JAVA_LANG_STRING_REF2PTR(*stringHandle);
00825         return string->count;
00826     } else {
00827         return -1;
00828     }
00829 } // KNI_GetStringLength()
00830 
00831 extern void KNI_GetStringRegion(jstring, jsize, jsize, jchar *);
00832 
00841 static inline void KNI_NewString(const jchar *uchars, jsize length,
00842                                  jobject stringHandle)
00843 {
00844     java_lang_String_t *str;
00845 
00846     str = jstring_create_from_unicode(uchars, length);
00847     *stringHandle = JAVA_LANG_STRING_PTR2REF(str);
00848 } // KNI_NewString()
00849 
00857 static inline void KNI_NewStringUTF(const char *utf8chars, jobject stringHandle)
00858 {
00859     java_lang_String_t *str;
00860 
00861     str = jstring_create_from_utf8((utf8chars));
00862     *stringHandle = JAVA_LANG_STRING_PTR2REF(str);
00863 } // KNI_NewStringUTF()
00864 
00865 /******************************************************************************
00866  * Array operations                                                           *
00867  ******************************************************************************/
00868 
00878 static inline jsize KNI_GetArrayLength(jarray array)
00879 {
00880     if (array) {
00881         return ((array_t *) *array)->length;
00882     } else {
00883         return -1;
00884     }
00885 } // KNI_GetArrayLength()
00886 
00894 static inline jboolean KNI_GetBooleanArrayElement(jbooleanArray arrayHandle,
00895                                                   jsize index)
00896 {
00897     array_t *array = (array_t *) *arrayHandle;
00898     uint8_t *data = array_get_data(array);
00899 
00900     return (*(data + (index >> 3)) >> (index & 0x7)) & 0x1;
00901 } // KNI_GetBooleanArrayElement()
00902 
00910 static inline jbyte KNI_GetByteArrayElement(jbyteArray arrayHandle, jsize index)
00911 {
00912     array_t *array = (array_t *) *arrayHandle;
00913     int8_t *data = array_get_data(array);
00914 
00915     return *(data + index);
00916 } // KNI_GetByteArrayElement()
00917 
00925 static inline jchar KNI_GetCharArrayElement(jcharArray arrayHandle, jsize index)
00926 {
00927     array_t *array = (array_t *) *arrayHandle;
00928     uint16_t *data = array_get_data(array);
00929 
00930     return *(data + index);
00931 } // KNI_GetCharArrayElement()
00932 
00940 static inline jshort KNI_GetShortArrayElement(jshortArray arrayHandle,
00941                                               jsize index)
00942 {
00943     array_t *array = (array_t *) *arrayHandle;
00944     int16_t *data = array_get_data(array);
00945 
00946     return *(data + index);
00947 } // KNI_GetShortArrayElement()
00948 
00956 static inline jint KNI_GetIntArrayElement(jintArray arrayHandle, jsize index)
00957 {
00958     array_t *array = (array_t *) *arrayHandle;
00959     int32_t *data = array_get_data(array);
00960 
00961     return *(data + index);
00962 } // KNI_GetIntArrayElement()
00963 
00971 static inline jlong KNI_GetLongArrayElement(jlongArray arrayHandle, jsize index)
00972 {
00973     array_t *array = (array_t *) *arrayHandle;
00974     int64_t *data = array_get_data(array);
00975 
00976     return *(data + index);
00977 } // KNI_GetLongArrayElement()
00978 
00979 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00980 
00988 static inline jfloat KNI_GetFloatArrayElement(jfloatArray arrayHandle,
00989                                               jsize index)
00990 {
00991     array_t *array = (array_t *) *arrayHandle;
00992     float *data = array_get_data(array);
00993 
00994     return *(data + index);
00995 } // KNI_GetFloatArrayElement()
00996 
01004 static inline jdouble KNI_GetDoubleArrayElement(jdoubleArray arrayHandle,
01005                                                 jsize index)
01006 {
01007     array_t *array = (array_t *) *arrayHandle;
01008     double *data = array_get_data(array);
01009 
01010     return *(data + index);
01011 } // KNI_GetDoubleArrayElement()
01012 
01013 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
01014 
01023 static inline void KNI_GetObjectArrayElement(jobjectArray arrayHandle,
01024                                              jint index, jobject toHandle)
01025 {
01026     array_t *array = (array_t *) *arrayHandle;
01027     uintptr_t *data = array_ref_get_data(array);
01028 
01029     *toHandle = *(data - index);
01030 } // KNI_GetObjectArrayElement()
01031 
01039 static inline void  KNI_SetBooleanArrayElement(jbooleanArray arrayHandle,
01040                                                jsize index, jboolean value)
01041 {
01042     array_t *array = (array_t *) *arrayHandle;
01043     uint8_t *data = array_get_data(array);
01044     uint8_t nvalue = value ^ 0x1;
01045     uint8_t nibble = *(data + (index >> 3));
01046 
01047     nibble |= (value << (index & 0x7));
01048     nibble &= ~(nvalue << (index & 0x7));
01049     *(data + (index >> 3)) = nibble;
01050 } // KNI_SetBooleanArrayElement()
01051 
01059 static inline void KNI_SetByteArrayElement(jbyteArray arrayHandle, jsize index,
01060                                            jbyte value)
01061 {
01062     array_t *array = (array_t *) *arrayHandle;
01063     int8_t *data = array_get_data(array);
01064 
01065     *(data + index) = value;
01066 } // KNI_SetByteArrayElement()
01067 
01075 static inline void KNI_SetCharArrayElement(jcharArray arrayHandle, jsize index,
01076                                            jchar value)
01077 {
01078     array_t *array = (array_t *) *arrayHandle;
01079     uint16_t *data = array_get_data(array);
01080 
01081     *(data + index) = value;
01082 } // KNI_SetCharArrayElement()
01083 
01091 static inline void KNI_SetShortArrayElement(jshortArray arrayHandle,
01092                                             jsize index, jshort value)
01093 {
01094     array_t *array = (array_t *) *arrayHandle;
01095     int16_t *data = array_get_data(array);
01096 
01097     *(data + index) = value;
01098 } // KNI_SetShortArrayElement()
01099 
01107 static inline void KNI_SetIntArrayElement(jintArray arrayHandle, jsize index,
01108                                           jint value)
01109 {
01110     array_t *array = (array_t *) *arrayHandle;
01111     int32_t *data = array_get_data(array);
01112 
01113     *(data + index) = value;
01114 } // KNI_SetIntArrayElement()
01115 
01123 static inline void KNI_SetLongArrayElement(jlongArray arrayHandle, jsize index,
01124                                            jlong value)
01125 {
01126     array_t *array = (array_t *) *arrayHandle;
01127     int64_t *data = array_get_data(array);
01128 
01129     *(data + index) = value;
01130 } // KNI_SetLongArrayElement()
01131 
01132 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
01133 
01141 static inline void KNI_SetFloatArrayElement(jfloatArray arrayHandle,
01142                                             jsize index, jfloat value)
01143 {
01144     array_t *array = (array_t *) *arrayHandle;
01145     float *data = array_get_data(array);
01146 
01147     *(data + index) = value;
01148 } // KNI_SetFloatArrayElement()
01149 
01157 static inline void KNI_SetDoubleArrayElement(jdoubleArray arrayHandle,
01158                                              jsize index, jdouble value)
01159 {
01160     array_t *array = (array_t *) *arrayHandle;
01161     double *data = array_get_data(array);
01162 
01163     *(data + index) = value;
01164 } // KNI_SetDoubleArrayElement()
01165 
01166 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
01167 
01176 static inline void KNI_SetObjectArrayElement(jobjectArray arrayHandle,
01177                                              jint index, jobject fromHandle)
01178 {
01179     array_t *array = (array_t *) *arrayHandle;
01180     uintptr_t *data = array_ref_get_data(array);
01181 
01182     *(data - index) = *fromHandle;
01183 } // KNI_SetObjectArrayElement()
01184 
01193 static inline void KNI_GetRawArrayRegion(jarray arrayHandle, jsize offset,
01194                                          jsize n, jbyte *dstBuffer)
01195 {
01196     // FIXME: If this function can be called on arrays of references
01197     array_t *array = (array_t *) *arrayHandle;
01198     char *data = array_get_data(array);
01199 
01200     memcpy(dstBuffer, data + offset, n);
01201 } // KNI_GetRawArrayRegion()
01202 
01211 static inline void KNI_SetRawArrayRegion(jarray arrayHandle, jsize offset,
01212                                          jsize n, const jbyte *srcBuffer)
01213 {
01214     // FIXME: If this function can be called on arrays of references
01215     array_t *array = (array_t *) *arrayHandle;
01216     char *data = array_get_data(array);
01217 
01218     memcpy(data + offset, srcBuffer, n);
01219 } // KNI_SetRawArrayRegion()
01220 
01221 /******************************************************************************
01222  * Parameter passing                                                          *
01223  ******************************************************************************/
01224 
01236 static inline jboolean KNI_GetParameterAsBoolean(jint index)
01237 {
01238     return (jboolean) *((int32_t *) (thread_self()->fp->locals + index));
01239 } // KNI_GetParameterAsBoolean()
01240 
01252 static inline jbyte KNI_GetParameterAsByte(jint index)
01253 {
01254     return (jbyte) *((int32_t *) (thread_self()->fp->locals + index));
01255 } // KNI_GetParameterAsByte()
01256 
01268 static inline jchar KNI_GetParameterAsChar(jint index)
01269 {
01270     return (jchar) *((int32_t *) (thread_self()->fp->locals + index));
01271 } // KNI_GetParameterAsChar()
01272 
01284 static inline jshort   KNI_GetParameterAsShort(jint index)
01285 {
01286     return (jshort) *((int32_t *) (thread_self()->fp->locals + index));
01287 } // KNI_GetParamterAsShort()
01288 
01300 static inline jint KNI_GetParameterAsInt(jint index)
01301 {
01302     return *((int32_t *) (thread_self()->fp->locals + index));
01303 } // KNI_GetParameterAsInt()
01304 
01316 static inline jlong KNI_GetParameterAsLong(jint index)
01317 {
01318     return *((int64_t *) (thread_self()->fp->locals + index));
01319 } // KNI_GetParameterAsLong()
01320 
01321 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
01322 
01334 static inline jfloat KNI_GetParameterAsFloat(jint index)
01335 {
01336     return *((float *) (thread_self()->fp->locals + index));
01337 } // KNI_GetParameterAsFloat()
01338 
01350 static inline jdouble KNI_GetParameterAsDouble(jint index)
01351 {
01352     return *((double *) (thread_self()->fp->locals + index));
01353 } // KNI_GetParameterAsDouble()
01354 
01355 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
01356 
01366 static inline void KNI_GetParameterAsObject(jint index, jobject toHandle)
01367 {
01368     *toHandle = *((uintptr_t *) (thread_self()->fp->locals + index));
01369 } // KNI_GetParameterAsObject()
01370 
01376 static inline void KNI_GetThisPointer(jobject toHandle)
01377 {
01378     *toHandle = *((uintptr_t *) (thread_self()->fp->locals));
01379 } // KNI_GetThisPointer()
01380 
01385 static inline void KNI_GetClassPointer(jclass toHandle)
01386 {
01387     *toHandle = class_get_object(thread_self()->fp->cl);
01388 } // KNI_GetClassPointer()
01389 
01393 #define KNI_ReturnVoid() return
01394 
01399 #define KNI_ReturnBoolean(value) return (value) ? 1 : 0
01400 
01405 #define KNI_ReturnByte(value) return (jbyte) (value)
01406 
01411 #define KNI_ReturnChar(value) return (jchar) (value)
01412 
01417 #define KNI_ReturnShort(value) return (jshort) (value)
01418 
01423 #define KNI_ReturnInt(value) return (jint) (value)
01424 
01429 #define KNI_ReturnLong(value) return (jlong) (value)
01430 
01431 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
01432 
01437 #define KNI_ReturnFloat(value) return (jfloat) (value)
01438 
01443 #define KNI_ReturnDouble(value) return (jdouble) (value)
01444 
01445 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
01446 
01447 /******************************************************************************
01448  * Handle operations                                                          *
01449  ******************************************************************************/
01450 
01457 static inline jobject _KNI_push_handle(jobject handle)
01458 {
01459     *handle = JNULL;
01460     thread_push_root(handle);
01461     return handle;
01462 } // _KNI_push_handle()
01463 
01467 #define KNI_StartHandles(n) \
01468 { \
01469     size_t __declared_count__ = 0; \
01470     uintptr_t __handles__[n]
01471 
01481 #define KNI_DeclareHandle(handle) \
01482     jobject handle = _KNI_push_handle(&__handles__[__declared_count__++])
01483 
01488 static inline jboolean KNI_IsNullHandle(jobject handle)
01489 {
01490     return *handle == JNULL;
01491 } // KNI_IsNullHandle()
01492 
01500 static inline jboolean KNI_IsSameObject(jobject obj1, jobject obj2)
01501 {
01502     return (*obj1 == *obj2);
01503 } // KNI_IsSameObject()
01504 
01508 static inline void KNI_ReleaseHandle(jobject handle)
01509 {
01510     *handle = JNULL;
01511 } // KNI_ReleaseHandle()
01512 
01516 #define KNI_EndHandles() \
01517     while (__declared_count__--) { \
01518         thread_pop_root(); \
01519     } \
01520 }
01521 
01528 #define KNI_EndHandlesAndReturnObject(objectHandle) \
01529     while (__declared_count__--) { \
01530         thread_pop_root(); \
01531     } \
01532     return (uintptr_t) *objectHandle; \
01533 }
01534 
01535 #endif // !JELATINE_KNI_H
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:38:45 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
